avoid: never name a real person (roles only)
never put words in a family member's mouth
visual: no family members/children in frame
positioning: Empower your fitness journey with clear, informative guidance.
angles_to_pursue: Highlight the benefits of different types of fitness equipment and how to use them effectively.
Share tips on creating a personalized workout plan tailored to individual goals and fitness levels.
Provide nutritional advice and meal planning tips to complement workout routines.
Discuss the importance of setting realistic fitness goals and tracking progress over time.
Offer insights into the latest fitness trends and how they can enhance workout routines.
research_requests: Identify specific fitness equipment that is most in demand among the target audience.
Explore successful content strategies used by competitors like fitnessfirstme.
Investigate customer preferences for subscription models and pricing transparency.
